text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I can't stay like this forever! I<n>have to do
something, or else nothing<n>will ever change!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: ...But how do I begin?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, with a greeting, of course. "Hey<n>there, Trainer
<username>. Nice job<n>out—"

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Yes, like that. And next, I should—

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Trainer <username>?!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: A-actually... Well, I was just<n>wondering...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
W-would you happen to have any<n>interest in
karaoke, perchance?!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Um... In that case, would you care to<n>join me
now?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her suggestion is a bit sudden, but I<n>agree to go
to karaoke with Trainer<n>Kiryuin.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Well... we're here.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: N-not really...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... I can't even remember<n>how many
years it's been since the<n>last time I went.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It was probably... when I was still in<n>preschool,
maybe?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I've entirely forgotten how this<n>works. Do we
have to call the staff to<n>request songs using this
phone?
choice_data_list: Actually, you use the tablet over there...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Sorry for inviting you out like this so<n>suddenly!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: A-actually...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Oh, there you are. Hey,<n>Meek—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What?! You don't hang out with your<n>trainer,
Meek?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...Not really.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That's wild. My trainer and I go to the<n>arcade
together all the time on my<n>days off!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
My trainer likes playing video games.<n>She's
sooo good at them. She's even<n>helped me get
better!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? That sounds fun...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I'm embarrassed to say this, but... I<n>don't have
any hobbies.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy reading trainer textbooks,<n>adjusting
training regimens, and<n>analyzing data. But those
things don't<n>count as hobbies...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: So there's nothing I can do for fun<n>with Meek!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But I don't want her to always be<n>bored because
of that!
choice_data_list:
So that's why you came up with the idea for
karaoke?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I remembered my mom taking<n>me when I
was very young.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
That was the last time I went, but I<n>thought if I
started going more, I could<n>call it a hobby!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I never seem to do anything but<n>study... It's how
I spent my whole<n>student life, and even now, I...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I don't know why I'm like this...
choice_data_list: A-anyway, why don't we start singing?!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Ah... R-right, we should get started!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: If it's okay with you, I'll go first!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Twinkle, twinkle, little star! ♪ How I<n>wonder what
you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Kiryuin may only know children's<n>songs, but her
voice is undeniably a<n>thing of beauty.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough... Oh my, I think Imight be losing my voice from all thatsinging. Haha...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much for accompanying<n>me today!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Really?! That's... I'm glad to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer <username>... If you<n>wouldn't mind...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Would you join me on my new<n>"hobby" again
sometime?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Only if it's not too much trouble, I<n>mean!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin looks to be in high<n>spirits as we
talk on the way back<n>home.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh... I-I see...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for springing such a weird<n>question on you
all of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Uh... Please forget I asked.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Anyway... see you later.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Trainer Kiryuin takes her leave,<n>looking dejected.
